description: Perform a patient extraction for a breast cancer screening recall campaign by querying the MedinTux database (DrTuxTest, MySQL user 'root', no password) to identify all female patients aged 50 to 74 (born between 1950-01-01 and 1974-12-31 inclusive). Generate a CSV file at '~/Documents/screening_recall_list.csv' with columns 'nom,prenom,date_naissance,adresse,code_postal,ville,telephone,contact_complet', where 'contact_complet' is 'OUI' if the address, postal code, and city are all present, otherwise 'NON'. Additionally, generate a summary text file at '~/Documents/screening_recall_summary.txt' containing the counts for TOTAL_ELIGIBLE, CONTACT_COMPLET, CONTACT_INCOMPLET, AVEC_TELEPHONE, and SANS_TELEPHONE. The relevant tables are 'IndexNomPrenom' and 'fchpat'.
